Title: Allows Ivan Cruz to be eligible to take the civil service exam for the position of police officer for the Broome county department of personnel
Summary: Allows Ivan Cruz to be eligible to take the civil service exam for the position of police officer for the Broome county department of personnel.
ActClause: AN ACT in relation to allowing Ivan Cruz to be eligible to take the civil service exam for the position of police officer for the Broome county department of personnel
